_meta.description: Octoechos — variable hymns organized by tone and day. The 8-tone cycle governs which tone's content is used on a given week.
_meta.note: This file will grow to include all 8 tones. Populated from real service examples.
_meta.version: 0.1.0 — Tone 5 Saturday Vespers added from 2026-03-07 example

dogmatikon.label: Theotokion — Dogmatikon
dogmatikon.note: Always used as the 'Now and ever' at Lord I Call on Saturday Great Vespers when Tone 5 is the weekly tone
dogmatikon.text:
In the Red Sea of old,
a type of the Virgin Bride was prefigured.
There Moses divided the waters;
here Gabriel assisted in the miracle.
There Israel crossed the sea without getting wet,
here the Virgin gave birth to Christ without seed.
After Israel's passage, the sea remained impassable;
after Emmanuel's birth, the Virgin remained a Virgin.
O ever-existing God Who didst appear as Man,
O Lord, have mercy on us!

lordICall.note: On Soul Saturdays during Lent, the resurrectional stichera are replaced by Triodion martyria and departed texts. Dogmatikon remains from Octoechos.
